Nosivad Wiki

Creature families, rarity, and mutations

Wiki

HomeGetting StartedAdventurer LevelsPlanar RiftsBreach GatesWorld BossesCreaturesLoot and RelicsShrines and LoreBounty BoardsReference

Creatures

Nosivad creatures can be ordinary area enemies, dynamic mutated enemies, rift-born enemies, breach guardians, or rare world bosses.

Enemy Rarity

Most enemies remain common. Special rarity enemies are intentionally less frequent, especially from natural respawns.

RarityPlayer Meaning
CommonBaseline creature.
UncommonSlightly stronger and more rewarding.
RareNoticeably stronger with better loot odds.
EpicDangerous mutation with high reward potential.
LegendaryVery rare natural threat; treat with caution.

Creature Sources

Starter Creatures

Field rats, sewer rats, and restless wolves around Eldeir are tuned to teach combat and bounty flow without flooding new players with money or power.

Rift-Born Creatures

Rift enemies arrive in waves and are slightly stronger than standard creatures in the same area. They have boosted XP and loot metadata.

Breach Creatures

Breach enemies inherit the gate grade and random theme. They are the core source of graded breach gear.

World Bosses

World bosses are randomized one-off threats. They are not meant to respawn predictably and should feel like major events.

Rift Corruption

Corrupted hosts are marked by a purple Corrupted Host name/title, a riftborne tooltip, a subtle void aura, and a body roughly twenty percent larger than normal. They are more violent, stronger, worth more XP, and have better loot potential. Bounty boards may offer Purge Rift Corruption contracts for hunting them.

Known Theme Families

UndeadBeastsDemonsArcaneWastesCultistsSerpentsBandits
